topPlaces.name: Gautam Budha Wildlife Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Gautam Budha Wildlife Sanctuary (also spelled Gautam Buddha) is a wildlife sanctuary located in Gaya district of Bihar state and Koderma district of Jharkhand state in east-central India. The refuge was established in 1976, and covers an area of 259 km2.

topPlaces.name: Kodarma
topPlaces.description: Kodarma (also spelled as Koderma) is a city and a notified area in the Koderma subdivision of the Koderma district in the Indian state of Jharkhand. It is also the administrative headquarter of Koderma district.

topPlaces.name: Rajauli Wildlife Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Rajauli Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area in Nawada district in the Indian state of Bihar. Established in 2019, it is spread across an area of 27.27 km2 (10.53 sq mi).

itinerary.title: Day 1 — Gautam Budha Wildlife Sanctuary & around

items.note: Gautam Budha Wildlife Sanctuary (also spelled Gautam Buddha) is a wildlife sanctuary located in Gaya district of Bihar state and Koderma district of Jharkhand state in east-central India. The refuge was established in 1976, and covers an area of 259 km2.

Kodarma (also spelled as Koderma) is a city and a notified area in the Koderma subdivision of the Koderma district in the Indian state of Jharkhand. It is also the administrative headquarter of Koderma district.
Rajauli Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area in Nawada district in the Indian state of Bihar. Established in 2019, it is spread across an area of 27.27 km2 (10.53 sq mi).

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Koderma Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Koderma Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Koderma Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Gaya International Airport (69 km) and the nearest railway station is Gaya Junction (67 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Koderma Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Koderma Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Koderma Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Koderma Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Koderma Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Gautam Budha Wildlife Sanctuary, Kodarma, Rajauli Wildlife Sanctuary.
